arrival.text: The TWA Hotel at JFK Airport is located at One Idlewild Drive, New York, New York 11430-1962. Upon entering the airport, proceed toward Terminal 5 and follow the traffic signs to our main entrance.

Present your parking pass to the valet attendant, who will give you a digital valet ticket that works with your mobile phone. The ticket includes instructions about how to request your car via text upon your return.

departure.text: Upon returning to JFK Airport and picking up your luggage, access your digital valet ticket on your mobile phone and text us to request your car. The valet attendant will drive your car to the main entrance of the TWA Hotel, where it will be waiting for you. To reach the TWA Hotel from Terminal 5 (JetBlue), take the escalator down to JetBlue’s baggage claim area. On the far right, you’ll see an elevator for the TWA Hotel. Take the elevator up to the hotel. Once out of the elevator, follow the red carpeted flight tube to the main entrance. To reach the TWA Hotel from all other terminals, take the AirTrain. Smarte Cartes and luggage carts (as well as small pets in a secured carriers) are permitted on the AirTrain.

Exit at the Terminal 5 (JetBlue) stop and follow the signs to the elevator on the same level as the train platform. Take the elevator down to Level 1. Walk left off the elevator, go through the doors, turn left and cross the street toward the Yellow Parking Garage. Turn left on the sidewalk and follow the walkway to the TWA Hotel front door.

common.title: TWA Hotel At Terminal 5 - Uncovered Valet
common.navigation_tip: The TWA Hotel at JFK Airport is located at One Idlewild Drive, New York, New York, 11430-1962. Upon entering the airport, proceed toward Terminal 5 and follow the traffic signs to our main entrance.
restrictions: Book a ride to the airport using a rideshare service!

Estimated oversize fee of $10 daily for vehicles between 65” and 75” in height and over 180” in length, or any vehicle taller than 75”. These fees are to be paid directly to the facility upon exit if you did not include them with your reservation.

Please note: If you return later than the time listed on your parking pass, additional fees will be charged at the time of pickup. The fees are as follows:

· Up to One Hour: $20

· Daily Max: $45
Please note: We may utilize overflow lots if necessary. Please be patient when retrieving your car from valet.

The only valet parking at JFK Airport! Located at the TWA Hotel, the only on-airport hotel at JFK Airport, our valet parking is a short walk from JetBlue’s Terminal 5 (just walk through the hotel’s iconic flight tubes!). You can grab the AirTrain across the street from the hotel 24/7 for a five-minute ride to all JFK terminals. Find more information at twahotel.com.

arrival.text: Show the valet your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device.
The valet will hand you a ticket and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit.
For the shuttle from the hotel to JFK airport, please reserve your seat for the time slot during check-in, as we have limited spaces per shuttle run.

departure.text: Once you arrive at your terminal, please follow the signs to the AirTrain and take it to Federal Circle. Once you arrive at Federal Circle, please call the hotel at 718-977-3300 or use the courtesy phone for pick-up. Please allow 20–30 minutes for the shuttle arrival due to the airport traffic and the airport renovation construction.
Simply leave when you are ready to go!

common.title: Fairfield Inn New York JFK Airport - Uncovered Valet
common.navigation_tip: From West and South We are just off the Belt Parkway, Exit 20 towards 150th street/Rockaway boulevard. Merge onto south conduit avenue and we will be on the corner of rockaway boulevard and south conduit. Make a right on 157th street and then make another right immediately to enter our Valet parking area. Please pull up to the back of the hotel where you will see the valet booth. Your car will be attended by our valet attendant. Please do not go to the front desk as they will not be able to assist you with your vehicle. From North to East We are just off the Belt Parkway/ Take Southern State Parkway (EAST) or Cross Island (SOUTH) to the belt parkway WEST. Then follow the signs to Belt Parkway / JFK Airport. Take exit 21A towards Rockaway Boulevard. At the first light make a left and we are located directly after the overpass on the right-hand side Make a right on 157th street and then make another right immediately to enter our Valet parking area. Please pull up to the back of the hotel where you will see the valet booth. Your car will be attended by our valet attendant. Please do not go to the front desk as they will not be able to assist you with your vehicle.
restrictions: Drop-Off to JFK Airport: Scheduled ONLY every HOUR on the HOUR by reservation ONLY. Guests will be dropped off directly at the departure terminal. For the shuttle from the hotel to JFK airport, please reserve your seat for the time slot during check-in, as we have limited spaces per shuttle run.
Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate extended cab pickup trucks, large passenger vans, and large SUVs (Suburban, Escalade, etc).
JFK Airport Hotel Shuttle: Our complimentary shuttle schedule runs daily from 4:00 AM to 12:00 Midnight, providing transportation to and from JFK Airport ONLY.

Limited spaces available, and seats are not guaranteed on each shuttle run. If guests choose to take their own means of transportation to the airport, the hotel will not be responsible for payment or any lost luggage. We do not reserve spots prior to arrival for drop off from the HOTEL TO JFK AIRPORT.

Pick-Up from JFK Airport: Pick-up is available upon request from 4:00 AM – 12:00 Midnight at Federal Circle – Station C ONLY per NYC Port Authority regulations. Once you arrive at your terminal, please follow the signs to the AirTrain and take it to Federal Circle. Once you arrive at Federal Circle, please call the hotel at 718-977-3300 or use the courtesy phone for pick-up. Please allow 20–30 minutes for the shuttle arrival due to the airport traffic and the airport renovation construction.
Please ensure to go to the Back of the hotel and not the front desk. The front desk will NOT be able to assist you.
Please note a $10 oversized vehicle daily rate may be due at the site if applicable.
The hotel will not be responsible for any damages or theft of during your reservations.
Vehicles picked up after the scheduled reservation date will incur a late pickup fee of $50.00 per day.

You may proceed to board the complimentary shuttle to JFK airport. The shuttle runs 24/7 on demand.

departure.text: Upon returning to the airport, collect your luggage and then call the phone number listed on the claim check you received when you first went to park. The shuttle will meet you at the pickup location detailed on the claim check.
Give the onsite attendant your claim check and they will retrieve your vehicle.
You are free to go!

You may proceed to board the shuttle to John F. Kennedy International Airport (JFK).

departure.text:
Upon arriving at JFK you will need to follow the signs to the AirTrain. 
Take the Air Train to Federal Circle. We ask that you give us a call once you’ve reached Federal Circle (718)322-2300. Passenger pick up is past the Avis Car Rental, proceed (under the white canopy)  (Free Hotel Shuttle Pick up sign).

When you return to the facility, show the valet your SpotHero parking pass and the ticket you received upon arrival. If your vehicle is considered oversize or if you parked outside of your reservation times, you will pay these fees now.
The valet will retrieve your car and you're free to go!

restrictions:
Extra Oversize Charges at lot at the Operator's discretion:
Small SUV: $5 per day
Mini Van / Large SUV: $5 per day
Truck: $7 per day
Height restriction: 6' 4"

IMPORTANT Shuttle Service InformationShuttle service runs every 10-15 minutes and 24 hours a day. Only 4 passengers per booking are allowed for the complimentary shuttle. Additional passengers will be charged $5. Shuttle service is FREE for 1st drop off & pick up, (So please have baggage in-hand and ready when calling for a pick-up), additional dispatches will be charged $20.

arrival.text:
Show the Attendant your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed of on a mobile device. The Attendant may scan your Parking Pass.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".

Take the elevator up to ground level, walk 300 feet, and take escalator down to subway.
Take the E or J train one station over to Sutphin Blvd Station, exit the station at Sutphin Blvd & Jamaica Avenue, walk 500 feet to AirTrain JFK (Jamaica Station), take AirTrain 2 stops to JFK International Airport.
The cost of the AirTrain is $5.00 (subject to change).

departure.text: Upon your return to JFK, gather your luggage and proceed to the AirTrain. Take the AirTrain to Sutphin Blvd Station, and walk to the E or J train. Proceed back to the Jamaica Center Garage.
When exiting, give the attendant your ticket and show your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device.
The gate will lift and you are free to go!

restrictions: An oversize fee will be charged daily for vehicles between 65” and 75” in height and over 180” in length, or any vehicle taller than 75”. The oversized fee will be determined by the garage and paid directly to the facility upon exit.

There is no shuttle service to JFK. Gather your belongings and request an Uber to the airport.

departure.text: There is no shuttle service from the airport to the garage. You may arrange transport via Uber, Taxi, or Public Transportation.
Show the valet the ticket you received upon entry and they will retrieve your car.

common.title: One Archer - JFK Covered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 92-27 160th St. This is the JFK Covered Valet, operated by LAZ Parking. It is located on the East side of 160th St. between Jamaica Ave. and Archer Ave.
restrictions: An oversize fee will be charged daily for vehicles between 65” and 75” in height and over 180” in length, or any vehicle taller than 75”. The oversized fee will be determined by the garage and paid directly to the facility upon exit.
Height restriction: 7' 6"
There is no shuttle service to or from the airport. You may arrange transport via Uber, Taxi, or Public Transportation.

amenities.description: A valet will park the users vehicle at this facility.
The surface of the facility is solid, such as asphalt or concrete.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility has a shuttle available to nearby destinations, like an airport.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.
The facility has EV charging capabilities.

items.full_description: A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.
A fee determined by the garage operator to cover additional garage operator costs.
The service fee helps us cover the costs of running our platform and providing services related to your reservation. For more information, visit our FAQs.

arrival.text: Report to the parking office upon arrival and show your SpotHero parking pass to the attendant. You will receive a ticket that you must keep throughout your stay.
Board the shuttle to JFK. The shuttle runs Monday-Sunday, 5:15 AM-9:45 PM.

departure.text: Upon your return to JFK, gather your belongings and board the shuttle back to the facility. The shuttle runs Monday-Sunday 5:15AM-10PM.
When you return to the facility, provide your ticket and the valet will retrieve your vehicle. Once retrieved, you are free to go!

common.title: Parking 4 Airport - Uncovered Valet
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on Jamaica Avenue. Enter this location at 131-02, Jamaica Ave. This is the 87-35 131st St. lot, operated by Parking 4 Airport. It is located on the east side of 131st St. between 131st St. and 88th Ave.
restrictions: 4 passengers and 4 bags allowed per vehicle (Extra may be charged at the Lot)
DO NOT UPDATE THROUGH SPOTHERO APP CALL DIRECTLY TO US IF YOU NEED ANY CHANGE ON YOUR RESERVATION.

Please Note: OVERSIZED VEHICLES will be charged an extra fee on-site based on the following: Small SUVs $3/day, Larger SUVs, Mini Vans, etc $4/day (Highlander, Honda pilot etc) , Larger SUVs $5 (Explorer, Tahoe, Escalade, Suburban, ETC), Trucks $6/day, and Larger Vans $7/day and up.
Reservations that are not properly extended will pay a "Late Fee" directly to the operator.
Your vehicle will not be accessible for pick up or drop off outside of operational hours. 5:00 AM - 11:00 PM.
